summary: Comprehensive regression testing of earnrm CRM - Iteration 21. User-reported Companies page issue NOT REPRODUCIBLE - Companies page loads correctly with all companies visible. All 18 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verification confirms all pages working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - login with valid credentials (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - invalid credentials returns 401/404
Backend: GET /api/companies - returns company list (3 companies found)
Backend: POST /api/companies - create company works
Backend: GET /api/leads - returns lead list (8 leads)
Backend: GET /api/contacts - returns contact list (1 contact)
Backend: GET /api/deals - returns deal list (7 deals)
Backend: GET /api/tasks - returns task list (8 tasks)
Backend: GET /api/calls - returns call list
Backend: GET /api/calls/stats/overview - returns stats
Backend: GET /api/chat/channels - returns channels
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns dashboard stats
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - returns users with count (9 users)
Backend: GET /api/admin/organizations - returns orgs (6 orgs)
Backend: GET /api/admin/contact-requests - returns support requests
Backend: POST /api/bulk/delete - endpoint exists and accepts requests
Backend: POST /api/bulk/update - endpoint exists and accepts requests
Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Frontend: Login page - email/password form works
Frontend: Dashboard - loads with stats (8 leads, 7 deals, 8 tasks, €65,000 pipeline)
Frontend: Companies page - loads correctly, shows 3 companies, Add Company works
Frontend: Leads page - loads with lead list, checkboxes, AI Summary, Draft Email, status dropdowns
Frontend: Leads detail dialog - Edit, Enrich, Score buttons visible
Frontend: Bulk selection - '1 selected' bar with Enrich, Delete, Clear buttons
Frontend: Contacts page - loads with Add Contact, Import CSV, Columns toggle
Frontend: Deals page - pipeline view with Lead/Qualified/Proposal/Negotiation/Won/Lost stages
Frontend: Tasks page - Kanban board with To Do/In Progress/Done columns, filter by owner
Frontend: Chat page - collapsible CHANNELS and LEAD DISCUSSIONS sections
Frontend: Calls page - stats (0 calls, 4 scheduled), Schedule Call button
Frontend: Settings page - 6 tabs (Profile, Organization, Team & Invites, Billing & Invoices, Integrations, Mobile App)
Frontend: Support page - FAQ/Training/Contact/Legal tabs with accordion questions
Frontend: Admin page - 6 tabs (Users, Organizations, Support, Discount Codes, Affiliates, Settings)
Frontend: Admin Users - shows Last Login and Joined columns
Frontend: Admin role dropdown - includes Member, Admin, Owner, Deputy Admin, Support, Super Admin
Frontend: Landing page - logo visible, PWA install section visible

user_reported_issue_resolution.issue: Companies page showing 'Failed to load companies' and 'Failed to add company' errors
evidence: UI screenshot shows Companies page loading correctly with all companies
Add Company dialog opens and works correctly
user_reported_issue_resolution.recommendation: User should try clearing browser cache and logging in again

context_for_next_testing_agent: All earnrm CRM features verified working. Companies page issue NOT REPRODUCIBLE - API and UI both working. Admin has 6 tabs including Support with status management. Role dropdown includes all roles: member, admin, owner, deputy_admin, support, super_admin. Leads page has bulk operations (select, delete, enrich), column visibility, and detail dialog. Chat has collapsible sections. Calls has Schedule Call and stats. All 18 backend tests pass.
